tweets.full_text:
Today Dario admits that Anthropic only planned for 10x growth but got hit with 80x instead 

Internally called a “success disaster”

Their compute effectively is off by a factor of 8x or more

Now do the outages, rate limits, nerfed performance make sense?

We need more compute! https://t.co/I4LAaJ10pf
tweets.summary: Anthropic CEO Dario承认公司遭遇"成功灾难"：计划10倍增长却遇到80倍，导致算力短缺8倍，解释了最近的服务中断和性能下降。具有信息差和行业洞察价值。

tweets.full_text:
New Anthropic research: Natural Language Autoencoders.

Models like Claude talk in words but think in numbers. The numbers—called activations—encode Claude’s thoughts, but not in a language we can read.

Here, we train Claude to translate its activations into human-readable text. https://t.co/pMLsxM2VAO
tweets.summary: Anthropic发布自然语言自编码器研究，Claude能将内部激活翻译为人类可读文本，实现AI思维可解释性突破。
angles: Claude的思维终于可以被看见，AI可解释性的突破
从黑盒到透明，Anthropic用自然语言打开AI大脑
AI思维可视化，理解Claude如何思考的新方式

tweets.full_text:
We’re sharing the research agenda of The Anthropic Institute, or TAI.

TAI will focus on four areas:

1) Economic diffusion
2) Threats and resilience
3) AI systems in the wild
4) AI-driven R&D

Read the full agenda: https://t.co/TvUINlE7Ae

I think it was around the third or fourth year after the show that used to be called CES became known as E3.

Back then, someone from the event staff asked me something like, “Some American celebrities are here ! do you want to meet them?” But I was just a hardcore game developer
tweets.summary: 原铁拳制作人Harada分享早年CES/E3时期的趣事，讲述被邀请见美国名人但专注游戏开发的故事。
